titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/60

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=375 status=live modified=2021-04-06 13:16:55.157322+00 | translation moa=376 status=live modified=2021-04-06 13:16:56.552392+00

p.cl: Omnibus Sancte Matris Ecclesie filius tam presentibus quam futuris Rogerus filius Glay . Salutem .

Sciatis me dedisse et concessisse et hac presenti Carta mea confirmasse
deo et Ecclesie Sancte Marie de Melros et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus pro salute Walter filii Alani Domini mei et pro salute mea . pro anima pa
tris et matris meorum . quandam Terram in territorio de Ynnerwyc sicut fossatum circuit eandam terram a fratribus eorum factum . in liberam . puram et perpetuam
elemosinam . solutam et quietam . ab omni terreno seruicio et exactione et demanda seculari  sicut aliquam elemosinam liberius quietius . et honorificencius
tenent et possident in regno Scocie . Et ego et Heredes mei warantizabimus predictis Monachis eandem terram contra omnes homines in perpetuum
Preterea dedi et concessi et Hac carta mea confirmaui predictis Monachis communem pasturam eiusdem ville de Ynnerwic de profunda uia ad capud
de Manyneth . ad diuisas illas que sunt inter nos et Monachos de Kelcou scilicet ex transuerso de Monesclhat usque in Wytsclad et de
Wytsclad usque in Edwardescloth et de Edwardescloth usque in Botkil et sic sursum per eandem aquam scilicet Botkil per rectas
diuisas de Ynnerwic usque ad Bercariam predictorum monachorum et de illa Bercaria usque ad profundam uiam prenominatam . Totam hanc
terram cum aisiamentis infra predictas diuisas scilicet in Petariis in turbariis . In Bruariis . In pasturis tenebunt predicti monachi de me et
Heredibus meis in puram et perpetuam elemosinam libere . quiete . et solute ab omnibus seruitiis . exactionibus . et demandis sicut aliqua elemo
sina liberius et quiecius et honorificencius tenetur in regno Scocie .

Hiis testibus . Domino meo Waltero filio Alani . Rogero Auenell . Hugone Mal
leuerer . Hugone Ridell . Willelmo de Heryz . et Multis Aliis
To all sons of Holy Mother Church both present and to come, Roger son of Glay sends greeting.

Know me to have given and granted, and by this my present charter to have made firm, to God and to the church of St Mary at Melrose and to the monks in that place serving God; for the salvation of Walter fitz Alan my lord, and for my own salvation, for the soul of my father and mother; certain land in the territory of Innerwick, as the ditch built by their brethren encloses the same land; in free, pure, and everlasting alms, released and quit from every earthly service and exaction, and secular demand, just as they freely, quitely, and honourably hold and possess any alms in the kingdom of Scotland. And I and my heirs shall warrant to the foresaid monks the same land against all men for ever. In addition I have given and granted, and by this my charter made firm, to the foresaid monks the common pasture of the same toun of Innerwick, from the low road to the head of the 'Manyneth', to those boundaries that are between us and the monks of Kelso, that is, transversely from the 'Monesclhat' to the 'Wytsclad', and from the 'Wytsclad' to the 'Edwardescloth', and from the 'Edwardescloth' to the 'Botkil', and so upwards by the same water, that is the 'Botkil', by the correct boundaries of Innerwick to the sheepfold of the foresaid monks, and from that sheepfold to the forenamed low road. The foresaid monks shall hold this whole land with easements within the foresaid boundaries, that is in peateries, in peat bogs, in heath ground, in pastures, of me and my heirs in pure and perpetual alms, freely, quitely, and released from all services, exactions and demands, just as any alms is freely and quitely and honourably held in the kingdom of Scotland.
With these witnesses: my lord, Walter fitz Alan; Roger Avenel; Hugh Mauleverer; Hugh Ridel; William de Heriz, and many others.
